items.title: Top Analyst Reports for Alphabet, Apple & Thermo Fisher
items.description: Alphabet headlines Zacks' top analyst reports as AI-driven growth in Cloud, Search and YouTube powers strong stock outperformance.

items.title: Boeing production stability drives positive outlook from Bank of America analysts
items.description: Bank of America analysts have reiterated a ‘Buy’ rating and a $270 price objective for Boeing Co (NYSE:BA, XETRA:BCO), describing the company’s current path as "an execution story that has wings." The bank wrote in a note that while the fourth quarter of 2025 highlighted several industrial...

items.title: Boeing Secures a $2.81B Contract to Upgrade South Korea's F-15 Fleet
items.description: BA lands a $2.81B deal to modernize South Korea's F-15K jets, locking in long-term defense work through 2037 and deepening its global military footprint.

items.title: BAE Systems receives $195 million contract for 30 additional Amphibious Combat Vehicles
items.description: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has received a $195 million contract for the production of additional Amphibious Combat Vehicles (ACVs) for the U.S. Marine Corps. This award increases the total number of ACV-30s ordered under that contract to more than 150.

items.title: Stratasys Begins Qualification of SAF™ PA12 Production-Ready Nylon for Key Industrial Use Cases
items.description: MINNETONKA, Minn. & REHOVOT, Israel, February 03, 2026--Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ: SSYS) today announced the launch of a qualification program of SAF™ PA12, a production-ready nylon material, designed to help manufacturers apply selective absorption fusion technology across key aerospace and industrial use cases. This program is intended to help manufacturers address modernization and reshoring initiatives by enabling more scalable, qualified additive manufacturing.
